title: Learn AWS IAM in less than 10 minutes
summary: Tutorial covering AWS Identity and Access Management basics, including users, roles, policies, least privilege principles, and IAM Access Analyzer. Demonstrates common beginner mistakes like granting admin access and storing credentials in code, with practical setup guidance for new AWS accounts.
